summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SmartTimetablePage and related features. All backend APIs (8/8) and frontend features working correctly. The new page displays timetables for all classes and teachers with export functionality (CSV/PDF).
critical_code_review_comments: SmartTimetablePage.jsx is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Export functionality (CSV/PDF) implemented correctly with proper Arabic encoding (BOM)
View modes (All/Class/Teacher) working correctly with proper filtering
The 'عرض الجدول' button in SchedulePageNew.jsx correctly navigates to /admin/smart-timetable
Generation result dialog is NOT shown when using Smart Scheduling Engine (line 285 comment confirms this)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing timetables (10 timetables, 60 sessions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SmartTimetablePage fully tested. All features working: timetable display for all classes/teachers, view mode switching (All/Class/Teacher), export (CSV/PDF), stats cards (60 sessions, 7 teachers, 3 classes, 0 conflicts). The 'عرض الجدول' button in SchedulePageNew navigates correctly to /admin/smart-timetable.

features: Stats cards showing: 60 sessions, 7 teachers, 3 classes, 0 conflicts
View mode tabs: الكل (All), فصل (Class), معلم (Teacher)
Timetable grids displaying correctly for each class
Teacher timetable view showing individual teacher schedules

export_functionality.csv_export: Working - downloads file with Arabic encoding (BOM)

generation_result_dialog_removed.note: When using Smart Scheduling Engine (handleGenerateSchedule), the result dialog is NOT shown. Line 285 in SchedulePageNew.jsx has comment: 'لا نعرض نافذة النتيجة - ننتقل مباشرة لعرض الجدول'
